segments.text_en: Abandonment of temples and gathering of divine powers
evidence: From the great heaven Inana set her mind on the great below.
She abandoned the office of en, abandoned the office of lagar, and descended to the underworld.
She collected the divine powers and grasped them in her hand.

segments.text_en: Journey to the underworld and instructions to Ninšubur
evidence: Inanna traveled towards the underworld.
When I have arrived in the underworld, make a lament for me on the ruin mounds.
Don’t let young lady Inanna be killed in the underworld.

segments.text_en: Arrival at Ganzer and Neti's consultation with Ereškigal
evidence: She shouted aggressively at the gate of the underworld
I am Inanna going to the east.
Let the seven gates of the underworld be bolted.

segments.text_en: Passage through the seven gates and death of Inanna
evidence: the lapis-lazuli measuring rod and measuring line were removed from her hand
Inanna, you must not open your mouth against the rites of the underworld.
The afflicted woman was turned into a corpse!
And the corpse was hung on a hook.

segments.text_en: Ninšubur's lament and appeals to the gods
evidence: After 3 days and 3 nights had passed, her minister Ninšubur carried out the instructions of her mistress.
Father Enlil, don’t let anyone kill your daughter in the underworld.
The divine powers of the underworld are divine powers which should not be craved
What has Inanna done? She has me worried.

segments.text_en: Creation of the rescuers and revival of Inanna
evidence: He removed some dirt from the tip of his fingernail and created the kur-gar.
To the gala-tura he gave the life-giving water.
Give us the corpse hanging on the hook.
1 of them sprinkled on it the life-giving plant and 1 the life-giving water.

segments.text_en: Ascent with demons and selection of Dumuzi as substitute
evidence: If Inanna is to ascend from the underworld, let her provide a substitute for herself.
Those who accompanied her... eat no flour offering and drink no libation.
How could I turn her over to you?
There was Dumuzi clothed in a magnificent garment and seated magnificently on a throne.

segments.text_en: Capture of Dumuzi and establishment of the seasonal cycle
evidence: Holy Inanna gave Dumuzi the shepherd into their hands.
Utu turned Dumuzi’s hands into snake’s hands.
If you show me where my man is, I will give you this gift
You for half the year and your sister for half the year
